title: A Modern Pride and Prejudice
overview: Pride and Prejudice follows Elizabeth Bennet and her oldest sister Jane through trial and error of first impressions, timeless proposals, mistaken opinions, and true love. When Jane meets the new eligible bachelor Mr. Bingley, she falls head over heels until he leaves town unexpectedly with his friend Mr. Darcy. While Elizabeth consoles her sister, she finds herself intertwined in the reasons behind Mr. Bingley's departure, her newfound friend Mr. Wickham, prejudices, and possibilities of finding love herself.
